logical_integration_order.role: completed resumable mirror tooling and provenance
BGZF resource classes, worker, indexes, and tests
general pilot, annotation, provenance, and scratch workflow
final /scratch alias, live guard, cleanup, and resource fixes; results superseded
raw-read acquisition and immutable evidence inputs
raw-read paired sensitivity tooling and pinned environment; decisions superseded

analysis/slurm/scale_vgp_real/revalidate: refusing cleanup outside validated requested/resolved scratch roots

forbidden_inferences: technical pipeline failure is a biological exclusion
two completed result packets constitute full VGP scale-out
selection_policy.historical_outputs: preserve bytes and bind their status in vgp_repair_base_artifact_status.tsv
selection_policy.implementation: retain dependency-correct code, pinned environments, tests, workers, manifests, and provenance tooling

skipped_main_conclusion.role: files preserved and status-bound, but synthesis claims are excluded from this base
